球队整体.title: Our 2025/2026 league schedule has been announced - Club Atlético de Madrid · Web oficial
球队整体.content:
We will visit Real Madrid in the reverse fixture on 21–22 March. The final match of the season’s first half, away at the Spotify Camp Nou against FC Barcelona, is yet to be scheduled. Although Matchday 19 is set for 10–11 January, both our team and the Catalan side will be playing in the Spanish Super Cup that week.
Our first home game will be on 23–24 August against Elche at the Riyadh Air Metropolitano, which will also host back-to-back city derbies on matchdays 6 (23–25 September) and 7 (27–28 September) against Rayo Vallecano and Real Madrid respectively.
We will visit Real Madrid in the reverse fixture on 21–22 March. The final match of the season’s first half, away at the Spotify Camp Nou against FC Barcelona, is yet to be scheduled. Although Matchday 19 is set for 10–11 January, both our team and the Catalan side will be playing in the Spanish Super Cup that week.
The town of San Juan de la Nava in Ávila hosted the presentation of the 2025/2026 LaLiga fixture list on Tuesday 1 July. Once again this season, the order of fixtures in the first half of the season will differ from that of the second. The new league season will get under way on the weekend of 16–17 August and finish on 23–24 May, with our opening match taking place against Espanyol at the RCDE Stadium, and our final match against Villarreal at the Estadio de la Cerámica.

球队整体.title: Atlético Madrid Vs Real Madrid [5-2] 2025/26 - Analysis
球队整体.content:
Atlético Madrid vs Real Madrid tactical analysis shares analysis of Atlético Madrid style of play and Diego Simeone tactics to beat Real Madrid.
Simeone knew what his team had to do to hurt the new Real Madrid, and Atlético Madrid showcased why they are arguably the most obnoxious team to play against in world football. In this tactical analysis, we will take a look at the tactics used by Diego Simeone and Xabi Alonso, how Atlético managed to hold off Rea,l and why the game unfolded the way it did.
Tags: Alvarez AtletícoAlvarez Vs Real MadridAtletíco MadridAtletico Madrid AnalysisAtletico Madrid Style Of PlayAtletico Madrid TacticsAtletíco Madrid Vs Real MadridAtletíco Vs RealDiego SimeoneDiego Simeone AnalysisDiego Simeone Coaching StyleDiego Simeone Style Of PlayDiego Simeone TacticsEl Derbi MadrileñoHow Good Is Real MadridJulián AlvarezJulián Alvarez AnalysisJulián Alvarez Atletíco MadridLa Liga AnalysisLa Liga TacticsMadrid DerbyReal MadridReal Madrid AnalysisReal Madrid NewsReal Madrid TacticsXabi Alonso Real Madrid
Going into the game, Real were the team in better form. However, as we all know, Atlético Madrid, under Diego Simeone management, love to be the underdog in these games, and they showed that they were ready to accept the role of the challenger even in a home game. Simeone had a clear tactical plan to hurt Real in this game, knowing how they love to play in their backline and recognizing that Alonso loves to play with Dean Huijsen and Eder Militao in the centre of that line, he knew that they could exploit Real in the box.

教练.title: Who Will Be Real Madrid’s New Head Coach After Xabi Alonso’s Exit? | beIN SPORTS
教练.content:
The announcement was made official through a club statement, which confirmed that Arbeloa, previously in charge of Real Madrid Castilla, would take over immediately. The decision underscores the club’s confidence in a coach who has been developed entirely within the Madrid system.
Real Madrid wasted no time after the departure of Xabi Alonso. Just one day after falling to Barcelona in the Spanish Super Cup final, the club confirmed Álvaro Arbeloa as the new head coach of the first team, placing their trust in a familiar figure to guide the squad through the remainder of the season.
The announcement was made official through a club statement, which confirmed that Arbeloa, previously in charge of Real Madrid Castilla, would take over immediately. The decision underscores the club’s confidence in a coach who has been developed entirely within the Madrid system.
As head coach of the U-19s, Arbeloa delivered a historic treble in the 2022–23 season, winning the league, the youth Copa del Rey, and the Copa de Campeones, followed by another league title in the 2024–25 campaign. In June 2025, he was promoted to Real Madrid Castilla, whom he currently has sitting fourth in Group 1 of the Primera RFEF.
Álvaro Arbeloa’s coaching career has been built exclusively inside Real Madrid. He began his journey on the sidelines during the 2020–21 season with the U-13 squad, leading the team to a league title.

教练.title: Official Announcement: Álvaro Arbeloa
教练.content:
Real Madrid C. F. would like to announce that Álvaro Arbeloa will be the new first team coach. Álvaro Arbeloa has been the coach of Castilla since June 2025, and has spent his entire coaching career in Real Madrid's youth academy since 2020.
OFFICIAL ANNOUNCEMENT.12/01/2026 · Real Madrid C. F. would like to announce that Álvaro Arbeloa will be the new first team coach. Álvaro Arbeloa has been the coach of Castilla since June 2025, and has spent his entire coaching career in Real Madrid's youth academy since 2020.
Real Madrid C. F. would like to announce that Álvaro Arbeloa will be the new first team coach. Álvaro Arbeloa has been the coach of Castilla since June 2025, and has spent his entire coaching career in Real Madrid's youth academy since 2020. He coached the Under-14s A in the 2020-2021 season, winning the league title, the Under-16s in the 2021-2022 season and the Under-19s from 2022 to 2025.
As coach of the Under-19s, he won the treble in the 2022-2023 season (League, Copa del Rey and Champions Cup) and the League in the 2024-2025 season. As a player, Álvaro Arbeloa was part of Real Madrid in one of the most successful periods of its history. He defended our shirt between 2009 and 2016, in 238 official matches.

教练.title: "Xabi Alonso is by far the worst Real Madrid coach of the last 20 years" | Marca
教练.content:
Javier Tinto: "I really liked the start of the game by Madrid, having a chance right at the start and although they were then tucked in at the back, they were able to get out and create chances. They played a very good game and we have to highlight Arbeloa. This shows that Vinicius did not throw Xabi Alonso out and yes, he did it all by himself. Xabi is the worst coach of Madrid in recent years".

Real Madrid. A masterclass from Arbeloa? The Real Madrid coach knocked out Guardiola and Mourinho in the same Champions League

教练.title: A masterclass from Arbeloa? The Real Madrid coach knocked out Guardiola and Mourinho in the same Champions League | Marca
教练.content:
After this victory, Arbeloa has managed to eliminate two of the most successful coaches in history, Mourinho and Pep Guardiola, an achievement worthy of note for a rookie coach. When asked about this feat in a press conference, the Real Madrid coach directed the praise towards his players with elegance and a touch of humor, a nod that keeps Real Madrid fans delighted: "I have some players who are amazing" replied Arbeloa.
Real Madrid coach continues to surprise in his debut season with Los Blancos · RYAN MITCHELL · 18/03/2026 - 05:55 CDT · Compartir en Facebook · Compartir en Twitter · Compartir en Telegram · Compartir en Whatsapp · Enviar por email · Real Madrid. Vinicius seals the deal against City ·
Real Madrid have had a very difficult year. At the beginning of the season it was thought that the team would fly high under the leadership of Xabi Alonso, who had just achieved historic success with Bayer Leverkusen in the Bundesliga. However, after a series of poor results and amid rumours of a broken dressing room, he was dismissed to make way for Alvaro Arbeloa · With the odds against him and no experience of coaching in the top flight, Arbeloa took on the challenge, brought Vini back into the spotlight, adjusted a couple of pieces and the Merengues are still inconsistent, capable of thrashing the most successful team of the last decade in the Premier League, or suffering elimination at the hands of a second division team, but each time showing better football and above all, harmony in the team.
After this victory, Arbeloa has managed to eliminate two of the most successful coaches in history, Mourinho and Pep Guardiola, an achievement worthy of note for a rookie coach. When asked about this feat in a press conference, the Real Madrid coach directed the praise towards his players with elegance and a touch of humor, a nod that keeps Real Madrid fans delighted: "I have some players who are amazing" replied Arbeloa.

教练.title: OFFICIAL: Álvaro Arbeloa replaces Xabi Alonso | Managing Madrid
教练.content:
Real Madrid CF: News · by Lucas NavarreteJan 12, 2026, 7:02 PM UTC · Real Madrid announced that former Castilla coach Álvaro Arbeloa will replace Xabi Alonso as the coach of the first team.
Real Madrid CF: News · by Lucas NavarreteJan 12, 2026, 7:02 PM UTC · Real Madrid announced that former Castilla coach Álvaro Arbeloa will replace Xabi Alonso as the coach of the first team. Real Madrid C. F. would like to announce that Álvaro Arbeloa will be the new first team coach.
Álvaro Arbeloa has been the coach of Castilla since June 2025, and has spent his entire coaching career in Real Madrid’s youth academy since 2020. He coached the Under-14s A in the 2020-2021 season, winning the league title, the Under-16s in the 2021-2022 season and the Under-19s from 2022 to 2025.
As coach of the Under-19s, he won the treble in the 2022-2023 season (League, Copa del Rey and Champions Cup) and the League in the 2024-2025 season. As a player, Álvaro Arbeloa was part of Real Madrid in one of the most successful periods of its history. He defended our shirt between 2009 and 2016, in 238 official matches.

教练.title: USMNT’s Mauricio Pochettino expected to attend Atletico Madrid vs Tottenham - The Athletic
教练.content:
March 9, 2026 · Share full article · 24 · Mauricio Pochettino is expected to attend Tuesday night’s Champions League first-leg tie between Atletico Madrid and Tottenham Hotspur.
March 9, 2026 · Share full article · 24 · Mauricio Pochettino is expected to attend Tuesday night’s Champions League first-leg tie between Atletico Madrid and Tottenham Hotspur. The 54-year-old USMNT head coach will be an official guest of Atletico, and may have a watching brief over midfielder Johnny Cardoso, who is pushing to be included in Pochettino’s squad for this summer’s World Cup.
Cardoso has started in just 12 matches for Atletico this term and has featured in five of the club’s 10 Champions League games. Pochettino and Spurs suffered heartbreak at the Madrid stadium in June 2019 when they were beaten 2-0 by Liverpool in the Champions League final. Five months later, the Argentine coach was sacked, bringing down the curtain on his five-and-a-half year spell in charge.
Spurs will be looking to appoint a permanent head coach after placing Igor Tudor in charge until the end of the season, following the sacking of Thomas Frank last month.

Atletico Madrid forward Antoine Griezmann has confirmed that he will remain with the Spanish club until at least the end of the current season, dashing Orlando City's hopes of signing him during the MLS primary transfer window. Griezmann, Atletico's all-time leading scorer, said his 'idea is to stay until the end' of the season, which includes the Copa del Rey final against Real Sociedad on April 18.
— Diego Simeone, Atletico Madrid Head Coach (Post-game press conference) Orlando City will likely revisit a potential move for Griezmann in the summer transfer window, which opens on July 13, 2026 and closes on September 2, 2026.
Griezmann's decision to stay at Atletico Madrid until the end of the season is a blow to Orlando City's hopes of signing the French forward during the current MLS primary transfer window. However, the MLS club still holds Griezmann's discovery rights, giving them the first claim on signing him when the summer transfer window opens. ... 球员.title: [2026年2月1日]皇马伤病状况及阵容分析：防线主力悉数回归，仅米利唐仍在恢复
球员.content:
[2026年2月1日]皇马伤病状况及阵容分析：防线主力悉数回归，仅米利唐仍在恢复 ... 根据《世界体育报》的最新报道，皇家马德里队的伤病状况已大幅好转。此前在西班牙超级杯半决赛对阵马德里竞技时受伤的吕迪格和费兰·门迪，均已完成医疗评估达到复出标准，并参与了球队合练。目前球队中唯一的伤员仅剩下中卫米利唐。这意味着皇马后防线的完整性与轮换选择将得到显著提升。
[2026年2月1日]皇马伤病状况及阵容分析：防线主力悉数回归，仅米利唐仍在恢复 ... 根据《世界体育报》的最新报道，皇家马德里队的伤病状况已大幅好转。此前在西班牙超级杯半决赛对阵马德里竞技时受伤的吕迪格和费兰·门迪，均已完成医疗评估达到复出标准，并参与了球队合练。目前球队中唯一的伤员仅剩下中卫米利唐。这意味着皇马后防线的完整性与轮换选择将得到显著提升。
伤病名单锐减：目前皇马一线队中，仅剩长期伤号米利唐一人，球队整体健康状况非常理想。 · 人员选择灵活：虽然本次训练仅征召了一名卡斯蒂亚门将梅斯特雷，但教练组将根据吕迪格、阿诺德和门迪三人的最终状态来决定是否补充青训球员进入比赛名单。
训练课中出现卡斯蒂亚门将梅斯特雷，显示了教练组对后备力量的关注。然而，这并不直接等同于他会进入下一场比赛的大名单。最终的人员名单，将严格取决于吕迪格、阿诺德以及门迪三人的身体与竞技状态评估结果。教练组的决策将以一线队球员的健康为首要考量。 ... 综上所述，皇家马德里队的伤病危机已基本解除，防线核心球员的回归将极大增强球队的稳定性和竞争力。球队目前的备战焦点已从伤病管理转向状态调整与战术磨合。
随着上述球员的回归，皇马在防线上的人员储备变得空前充裕。目前，仅有米利唐因重伤仍在漫长的康复过程中，他是阵中唯一的长期病号。这使得教练在排兵布阵时，尤其是在密集赛程下，拥有了更多的轮换空间和战术选择。

球员.title: 皇马巴西双料球星罗德里戈韧带撕裂将缺席2026世界杯
球员.content:
皇家马德里边锋罗德里戈被诊断为右膝前十字韧带撕裂。这名球员是在西甲第26轮对阵赫塔菲的比赛中（0:1）受的重伤——这是他缺席一个月后的首场比赛。这位巴西球员将赛季报销，并缺席2026年世界杯。
据权威媒体报道，3月3日上午，罗德里戈接受了医学检查，结果证实了十字韧带撕裂。皇家马德里俱乐部很快证实了这一伤病消息。 · 俱乐部新闻服务部门在一份声明中表示："根据对我们球员罗德里戈进行的检查结果，诊断其为右膝前十字韧带撕裂和外侧半月板破裂。"
皇家马德里边锋罗德里戈被诊断为右膝前十字韧带撕裂。这名球员是在西甲第26轮对阵赫塔菲的比赛中（0:1）受的重伤——这是他缺席一个月后的首场比赛。这位巴西球员将赛季报销，并缺席2026年世界杯。
本赛季，罗德里戈在各项赛事中出场27次，打进3球并送出6次助攻。他是巴西国家队的重要球员：去年秋天，在为世界杯备战的框架内，这位边锋代表国家队参加了四场友谊赛。其中三场比赛他出场时间超过80分钟，对阵韩国队打入两球，并在与塞内加尔的比赛中贡献一次助攻。
去年11月，巴西国家队主帅卡洛·安切洛蒂的话说："他非常有动力，表现很好。罗德里戈对这支球队来说是非常重要的球员，因为他拥有宝贵的技术能力，并且可以胜任攻击线上的所有位置。罗德里戈过去遇到过一些问题，但他都很好地克服了。"

球员.title: [2026年03月06日]深度解析：皇马伤病潮下的西甲变局，黑马塞尔塔迎最佳良机
球员.content:
伤病重创：皇马确认将缺少姆巴佩（左膝扭伤）、贝林厄姆（腿筋伤势）以及罗德里戈（十字韧带断裂，赛季报销）等几乎整套锋线与中场核心。 · 阵容残缺：除上述主力外，米利唐、阿拉巴等老伤号及停赛球员使得皇马...
伤病重创：皇马确认将缺少姆巴佩（左膝扭伤）、贝林厄姆（腿筋伤势）以及罗德里戈（十字韧带断裂，赛季报销）等几乎整套锋线与中场核心。 · 阵容残缺：除上述主力外，米利唐、阿拉巴等老伤号及停赛球员使得皇马一线队
根据今日（3月6日）确认的最新消息，皇家马德里正经历近年来最严重的伤病潮。进攻端三大王牌 · 姆巴佩、贝林厄姆和罗德里戈均确定无法出战。其中，罗德里戈的十字韧带伤势意味着他已提前告别本赛季。此外，后防线上的长期伤员米利唐、阿拉巴，以及塞巴略斯等球员同样高挂免战牌，再加上累积黄牌停赛的球员，皇马主帅几乎无法派出一套完整的主力阵容。
北京时间2026年3月7日凌晨，西甲联赛第27轮一场焦点战将在巴莱多斯球场上演，由状态火热的维戈塞尔塔迎战正遭遇严重伤病危机的皇家马德里。本场比赛因皇马多达近十名主力球员的集体缺阵，其赛果将对联赛争冠与欧战资格格局产生深远影响，也深刻诠释了足球运动中团队深度与意外因素如何共同塑造赛事的魅力。
对于塞尔塔而言，此役是证明自己“黑马”成色的黄金机会，若能取胜，其欧战梦想将更加清晰。而对于皇马，如何在残阵中激发替补球员和青年才俊的潜能，将考验教练团队的智慧。这场比赛的胜负，远不止三分那么简单，它可能成为影响两队赛季最终走向，乃至整个西甲争冠与欧战席位格局的

球员.title: 新浪西甲热点小时报丨2026年03月05日21时_今日实时西甲热点速递
球员.content:
【核心摘要】北京时间2026年3月7日凌晨04:00，西甲联赛第27轮将上演一场焦点对决，维戈塞尔塔坐镇主场巴莱多斯球场迎战皇家马德里。当前最引人注目的情况是双方截然不同的竞技状态和伤病状况：塞尔塔近期豪取两连胜，势头正盛；而卫冕冠军皇家马德里则面临严重的伤病潮侵袭，阵容严重不整。【关键要点一览】比赛时间：北京时间2026年3月7日凌晨04:00。皇马伤病重创：锋线核心罗德里戈重伤赛季报销，姆巴佩、贝林厄姆、米利唐、塞瓦略斯等多位主力同样伤缺。塞尔塔状态火热：已取得西甲两连胜，积42分排名第6，主力阵容相对齐整，前锋伊格莱西亚斯有望回归首发。
据《阿斯报》的消息，在罗德里遭遇重伤人生这一最艰难的时刻，皇马会继续保持对他的支持。而且这份支持不只着眼当下，不只陪伴他度过刚刚开始的煎熬，更看向更远的未来。“你的未来就在这里。”这是俱乐部向巴西人传递的内部信号，他与皇马的合同原本就签到2028年。这次伤病没有动摇任何事，也没有改变任何计划——因为本就没有需要改变的东西，至少在他的长远前景上是如此。右膝的重伤让他提前告别本赛季，也告别了世界杯，但从未告别皇马。俱乐部的目光已经投向明年的规划，如果届时双方的状态和感受都保持一致，不排除会坐下来商谈续约。
【核心摘要】北京时间2026年3月7日凌晨04:00，西甲联赛第27轮将上演一场焦点对决，维戈塞尔塔坐镇主场巴莱多斯球场迎战皇家马德里。当前最引人注目的情况是双方截然不同的竞技状态和伤病状况：塞尔塔近期豪取两连胜，势头正盛；而卫冕冠军皇家马德里则面临严重的伤病潮侵袭，阵容严重不整。【关键要点一览】比赛时间：北京时间2026年3月7日凌晨04:00。皇马伤病重创：锋线核心罗德里戈重伤赛季报销，姆巴佩、贝林厄姆、米利唐、塞瓦略斯等多位主力同样伤缺。塞尔塔状态火热：已取得西甲两连胜，积42分排名第6，主力阵容相对齐整，前锋伊格莱西亚斯有望回归首发。
来源：直播吧直播吧03月05日讯 据塞尔电台报道，姆巴佩的伤缺时间仍没有确切消息，皇马不相信姆巴佩团队对于伤情的诊断结果。报道称，记者阿里茨·加比隆多在塞尔电台节目中表示：“我感觉皇马不再相信姆巴佩团队说的话了。在我看来，这里显然存在两种医疗标准。因为，一边有人说他大概要缺阵一个月，而且我确认这个信息也从其他渠道得到了证实，另一边皇马却相信他下周就能复出。这中间肯定有问题。"在我看来，皇马已经不再信任姆巴佩团队自己给出的诊断了。所以，我认为俱乐部正着手处理这件事，因为情况确实不妙。
来源：懂球帝马德里竞技在淘汰巴塞罗那晋级国王杯决赛后，球队内部气氛明显提升。前马竞球员胡安弗兰在塞尔电台节目中谈到西蒙尼赛后的名言“这就是马竞”，表示自己只部分认同，并认为如今从外部来看，这句话的含义已经有所不同。在诺坎普完成一场“生存式”比赛后，马德里竞技成功闯入国王杯决赛。球队在首回合中曾在利雅得航空大都会球场以4-0大胜，因此带着巨大优势来到客场。但尽管比分占优，晋级并没有提前锁定。来到巴塞罗那主场后，巴萨一度紧紧抓住完成历史性逆转的希望，球队内部也对此深信不疑，主帅弗里克更以“让不可能成为可能”的信念激励更衣室，并且一度接近实现目标。

球员.title: 罗德里戈伤愈复出，皇马位置却被取消，他的未来还有戏吗？
球员.content:
罗德里戈的复出之路不算顺畅，他这几天一直随队正常合练，状态逐步回升，原本有机会出战皇马与本菲卡的欧冠次回合比赛，却因停赛遗憾缺席，只能等到下周一对阵赫塔菲时才能重返赛场。据悉，罗德里戈此次伤病是肌腱炎，自2月6日对阵巴列卡诺的比赛中替补登场15分钟后便宣告伤停，期间错过了瓦伦西亚、皇家社会等多场联赛，以及欧冠对阵本菲卡的关键对决，一养就是大半个月。
罗德里戈的复出之路不算顺畅，他这几天一直随队正常合练，状态逐步回升，原本有机会出战皇马与本菲卡的欧冠次回合比赛，却因停赛遗憾缺席，只能等到下周一对阵赫塔菲时才能重返赛场。据悉，罗德里戈此次伤病是肌腱炎，自2月6日对阵巴列卡诺的比赛中替补登场15分钟后便宣告伤停，期间错过了瓦伦西亚、皇家社会等多场联赛，以及欧冠对阵本菲卡的关键对决，一养就是大半个月。
这种战术变化，早已让另一位边路球员马斯坦托诺淡出首发，如今罗德里戈复出，也面临着同样的困境。要知道，在阿隆索执教后期，罗德里戈曾逐渐重新获得信任，可阿韦洛亚接手后，他的处境急转直下。更尴尬的是，阿韦洛亚执教皇马的46天里，罗德里戈有32天处于伤缺状态，在其带队的11场比赛中，罗德里戈仅替补登场3次，累计出场时间仅48分钟，两人几乎没有太多战术磨合的机会，阿韦洛亚心中的首发框架，似乎早已没有罗德里戈的位置。
在右边锋位置“消失”的情况下，罗德里戈想要争夺首发，大致有三条路径。一是转型左路，成为维尼修斯的替补，可维尼修斯的主力位置稳固，罗德里戈很难获得太多出场时间；二是在姆巴佩缺阵时，与贡萨洛-加西亚竞争中锋位置，但这并非他的擅长位置，发挥难免受限；是转型进攻型中场，与居莱尔竞争，可待贝林厄姆复出后，这个位置还会面临布拉欣-迪亚斯、马斯坦托诺等球员的竞争，难度可想而知。
比伤病更棘手的是，他伤缺的这段时间，皇马主帅阿韦洛亚彻底重构了球队战术。球队不再沿用以往的三前锋阵型，而是主打四中场体系，罗德里戈赖以立足的右边锋位置被直接“取消”。如今皇马的锋线核心是左路的维尼修斯和中路的姆巴佩，四中场则由琼阿梅尼、卡马文加、巴尔韦德和居莱尔组成，其中巴尔韦德会兼顾右路进攻组织，再加上阿诺德的边路覆盖，传统右边锋的角色已被彻底移除。

球员.title: Koke suffers a muscular injury to his right leg - Club Atlético de Madrid · Web oficial
球员.content:
Koke ended the game last Saturday ... and the medical tests conducted by the medical staff confirmed that the captain has suffered an injury to right leg....
February 8, 2026 - 17:12 · The line-ups from Atlético de Madrid vs Betis · February 6, 2026 - 19:21 · We take on FC Barcelona in the semi-finals of the Copa del Rey · February 6, 2026 - 15:45 · Real Betis visit the Riyadh Air Metropolitano ·
Koke ended the game last Saturday against RC Celta experiencing some discomfort. The midfielder underwent some tests following the match, and the medical tests conducted by the medical staff confirmed that the captain has suffered an injury to right leg.
The Rojiblanco midfielder will undergo physiotherapy session and recovery work in the gym. The evolution of his injury will then determine when he will return to action.

球员.title: Atlético Madrid lose Pablo Barrios to injury ahead of Copa del Rey semi-final vs Barcelona - Yahoo Sports
球员.content:
SEVILLE, SPAIN - FEBRUARY 5: Pablo Barrios of Atletico de Madrid leaves the field injured during the Copa Del Rey match between Real Betis Balompie and Atletico de Madrid at Estadio de La Cartuja on February 5, 2026 in Seville, Spain.
The young midfielder is sidelined for weeks, forcing Simeone into a rethink
Barcelona’s trip to the Metropolitano suddenly looks a little different because of an injury. Pablo Barrios will not be available for the first leg of the Copa del Rey semi-final after picking up a muscle problem in his right thigh. The problem flared up during Atlético de Madrid’s emphatic 5-0 win over Real Betis. Barrios, one of Atlético Madrid’s most reliable midfield engines this season, had already been dealing with physical issues in recent weeks, and it culminated in a muscle problem.
Players with talent and work play, whether they are 35 or 20.” · Barrios is exactly the kind of midfielder who can disrupt Barça’s rhythm, especially in a high-intensity first leg away from home. However, Atlético do have other options to plug the gap for the upcoming match.
He lasted barely ten minutes of the second half before limping off, and subsequent tests confirmed a muscle injury that will keep him out for close to a month. ... That window rules him out of the Copa clash with Barcelona on February 12 and a demanding stretch that also includes UEFA Champions League ties against Club Brugge and several La Liga fixtures. Atlético are hopeful he might be available for the return leg at Camp Nou on March 3, but even that remains on the edge of the recovery timeline.
